name: plugin-harness
description: Authoring tool for Claude Code Skills, Claude Code Plugins, and Codex Skills. Bundles three interview-driven skills (plugin-harness, skill-creator, plugin-creator) that emit dual-runtime skill and plugin artifacts per the Agent Skills standard.
_license_comment: The repository currently ships without a LICENSE file (per README §Status). Field set to 'UNLICENSED' explicitly; will be updated when a license is added.
